text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm grabbing lunch with Tokai Teio...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I knew there had to be some secret.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You gotta be gettin' close to your limit! That's
thirty bowls already!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, you might not have one, but your stomach
does!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's just like Prez said: "Oguri possesses boundless
power."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Boundless power... Boundless means without limit.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So, in other words, if I keep eating past my limit,
I'll also obtain boundless power!
choice_data_list: I don't think that's what she meant...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Then what did she mean?
choice_data_list: Let's just watch a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ugh, what more is there to watch? I mean...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah! She just stood up and... went to get a salad!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's it! A balanced and healthy diet is the real
secret to gaining power! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like that wasn't quite what Symboli Rudolf
had in mind either, but... I think we can leave it at
that.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna have thirty bowls... No, I need to
surpass Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It goes without saying, but Tokai Teio's stomach
truly reaches its limit.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... I'll get it next time...
